message:
chore: upgrade actions/github-script v7 → v8 (Node.js 24) across all workflows (#5751)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -813,7 +813,7 @@ jobs:
       COPILOT_STALL_ESCALATION_MINUTES: 60
     steps:
       - name: Detect stalled Copilot assignments
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |

@@ -3438,7 +3438,7 @@ jobs:
       # ── Issue Creation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
 
       - name: Create issues for failures
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           BUILD_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.build_check.outcome }}
           LINT_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.lint_check.outcome }}

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event.assignee.login == 'Copilot' || contains(github.event.assignee.login, 'copilot')
     steps:
       - name: Add triage labels
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const issue = context.payload.issue;

@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ jobs:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Find and remove old screenshots
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const { execFileSync } = require('child_process');

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
       contains(github.event.issue.body, 'Submitted via KubeStellar Console')
     steps:
       - name: Apply labels to console-submitted issue
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const issue = context.payload.issue;

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Handle Netlify Failure
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const prs = context.payload.check_run.pull_requests;

@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ jobs:
           sleep 600
 
       - name: Check for unaddressed comments
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |

@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Check Copilot PRs (3x with 20s intervals)
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |

@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - name: Process Copilot queue and retry failures
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO }}
           script: |

@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Apply Copilot review suggestions
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |

@@ -126,7 +126,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Comment on PR
         if: steps.gate.outputs.status != 'skip'
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');

@@ -255,7 +255,7 @@ jobs:
           retention-days: 30
 
       - name: Update coverage badge gist (with regression guard)
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           GIST_ID: ${{ env.GIST_ID }}
           COVERAGE_PCT: ${{ steps.cov.outputs.pct }}
@@ -368,7 +368,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Open issue for test failures
         if: needs.test-shard.result == 'failure'
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           FAILED_TESTS: ${{ steps.failures.outputs.list }}
           FAILED_COUNT: ${{ steps.failures.outputs.count }}

@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Analyze past week's coverage runs
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const REVIEW_DAYS = parseInt(process.env.REVIEW_DAYS || '7');

@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ jobs:
         run: npm install googleapis@144
 
       - name: Query GA4 and create issues
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY: ${{ secrets.GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
           GA4_PROPERTY_ID: ${{ secrets.GA4_PROPERTY_ID }}

@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ jobs:
         run: npm install googleapis@144
 
       - name: Check mobile traffic health
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY: ${{ secrets.GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY }}
           GA4_PROPERTY_ID: ${{ secrets.GA4_PROPERTY_ID }}

@@ -389,7 +389,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create per-suite issues for failures & auto-close passing
         if: github.event.inputs.skip_issue_creation != 'true'
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');

@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create issue for failures
         if: failure() && inputs.skip_issue_creation != true
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |

@@ -101,7 +101,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create or Close ZAP Issue
         if: always() && inputs.skip_issue_creation != true
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           HAS_FINDINGS: ${{ steps.zap-results.outputs.has_findings }}
           HIGH_COUNT: ${{ steps.zap-results.outputs.high_count }}
@@ -269,7 +269,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create or Close Nuclei Issue
         if: always() && inputs.skip_issue_creation != true
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           HAS_FINDINGS: ${{ steps.nuclei-results.outputs.has_findings }}
           FINDING_COUNT: ${{ steps.nuclei-results.outputs.finding_count }}

@@ -195,7 +195,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create issues for findings
         if: steps.scan.outputs.total != '0' && inputs.skip_issue_creation != true
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         env:
           TOTAL_FINDINGS: ${{ steps.scan.outputs.total }}
           COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}

@@ -180,7 +180,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Comment on PR with test failures
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && needs.test.result == 'failure'
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Post AI coding notice
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const owner = context.repo.owner;

@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Process screenshot comment
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@v8
         with:
           script: |
             const issueNumber = context.issue.number;
